basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has published the Project Technician Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Project Technician position on a contract basis. Candidates holding an M.Sc. in Biotechnology, Medical Laboratory Technology, or a related field are eligible to apply online. The application process is open until 27 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Biotechnology or a related field Medical Lab Technology
qualification.details: M.Sc in Biotechnology or a related field Medical Lab Technology with minimum 1 year of experience (desirable).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Technician Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Madras Project Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Madras Project Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_madras_ii: M.Sc in Biotechnology or a related field Medical Lab Technology

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Technician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Madras Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Madras Project Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Technician Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Madras Project Technician Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Sc in Biotechnology or a related field Medical Lab Technology with minimum 1 year of experience (desirable).

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Madras Project Technician Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Technician Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Project Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Project Technician position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Project Technician post at IIT Madras is 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technician role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc degree in Biotechnology or a related field like Medical Lab Technology to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the IIT Madras Project Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technician post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 41,000/- per month for the Project Technician position.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Project Technician role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by a test or interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Technician post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technician position as per the official notification released by IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Madras Project Technician recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Madras offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: While the specific age limits are not detailed here, IIT Madras generally follows government norms for age relaxation for reserved categories. Please refer to the official notification for exact details.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Technician position at IIT Madras is a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the direct links to the official notification PDF and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
